overview: This program is designed for an intermediate lifter aiming to cut body fat while maintaining muscle mass. The program follows an Upper/Lower split with 4 training days per week. Each phase focuses on different aspects of training, with a deload week to ensure recovery and prevent overtraining. Due to knee pain, exercises that could exacerbate the condition are avoided or modified.
progression_rules: Double progression model: aim to hit the top of the rep range for all sets before increasing weight. RPE 6-8 for compounds, RIR 2-4; RPE 6-8 for isolation, RIR 1-3.

days.notes: Focus on maintaining good form and control throughout each rep.

exercises.name: Leg Press
exercises.notes: Avoid deep knee flexion due to knee pain.

days.notes: Focus on controlled movements to protect the knees.
Emphasize form over weight to maximize muscle engagement.

exercises.name: Goblet Squat
exercises.notes: Modify depth to comfort due to knee pain.

exercises.name: Leg Extension
exercises.notes: Light weight to avoid knee strain.

days.notes: Maintain a focus on knee-friendly exercises and movements.
